text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
There are so many Umamusume here... It still feels
weird to me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You were the only Umamusume living in your
hometown, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Right. That's probably why I get a little nervous
around the others occasionally...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But I made a promise to my mom, so I've gotta
make lots and lots of friends here!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm sure you'll do just that.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Once I make a hundred friends, I wanna have a
huuuge picnic with everyone! ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
When that happens, let's eat lots and lots of
carrot sandwiches!
